nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: Entry point for the automation. Accepts POST requests with an activity payload. See schemas/activity-input-payload-example.json for the expected input structure.

nodes.name: Provider Config
nodes.notes: CONFIGURE THIS NODE: Set your apiUrl, model, and credentialName. Do not hardcode API keys. Use n8n HTTP Header Auth credentials. Adjust clustering thresholds as needed.

nodes.name: Normalize Events
nodes.notes: Validates required fields, normalizes event structure, and sorts events chronologically. Throws on missing required fields.

nodes.name: Cluster Repeated Behavior
nodes.notes: Groups events by object_name + object_category. Counts revisits, edits, reopens, defers, sends, submits, discards. Selects the primary cluster by highest event volume.

nodes.name: Validate Cluster
nodes.notes: Validates the primary cluster against configured thresholds. Low-signal or empty clusters are marked invalid and short-circuited before reaching the AI node.

nodes.name: If Valid
nodes.notes: Routes valid clusters to AI analysis. Routes invalid/low-signal clusters to a short-circuit response node.

nodes.name: Low Signal Response
nodes.notes: Handles clusters that do not meet minimum thresholds. Returns a structured low-signal response without calling the AI model.

nodes.name: Prep Loop Analysis Request
nodes.notes: Constructs system and user prompts for single-loop AI analysis. In production, load prompt text from prompts/system-loop-analysis.md and prompts/user-loop-analysis-template.md.

nodes.name: AI: Analyze Loop
nodes.notes: Calls the configured AI provider. Replace credential reference with your own n8n credential. Retries up to 3 times on failure with 2-second wait. See docs/credential-setup.md.

nodes.name: Parse Loop Analysis
nodes.notes: Parses and validates AI response JSON. Gracefully handles malformed output by flagging needs_human_review. Supports both OpenAI-style and Anthropic-style response formats.

nodes.name: Deterministic Friction Checks
nodes.notes: Rule-based post-processing layer. Applies objective overrides on top of AI output: severity escalation, loop type correction, confidence downgrade, and human review flagging. Runs regardless of AI output quality.

nodes.name: Human Review Override
nodes.notes: Handles human review routing. In production: add a notification node (Slack, email, webhook) after this node when _debug_human_review_pending is true. Currently passes through without blocking.

nodes.name: If Weekly Review
nodes.notes: Routes to weekly pattern review if analysis_mode is 'weekly_review'. Otherwise routes directly to final response.

nodes.name: Prep Weekly Pattern Review
nodes.notes: Constructs prompts for the weekly pattern review call. In production, load prompt text from prompts/system-weekly-pattern-review.md and prompts/user-weekly-pattern-review-template.md.

nodes.name: AI: Weekly Pattern Review
nodes.notes: AI call for weekly pattern review. Uses the same credential as the single-loop analysis node. Retries up to 3 times.

nodes.name: Parse Weekly Pattern Review
nodes.notes: Parses weekly review AI response. Handles malformed output gracefully.

nodes.name: Final Response
nodes.notes: Assembles the clean public response. All _debug_ fields are stripped here. Only fields defined in the output schema are included in the final response.

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook
nodes.notes: Returns the final clean JSON response to the caller. HTTP 200 on success.
